name: previous
description: How to Install the Previous Version

blocks.text: How to Install the Previous Version
If you suspect that a newer version is causing issues, you can install the previous version at any time by uninstalling the current version from your device and following the instructions below.

blocks.name: **Quest**
blocks.value:
Download the previous version using the [Release Channel](https://vrdiscord.com/screenshots/vd/releasechannel/release.jpg) option to choose 'Previous' within your Quest by clicking the [three dots](https://vrdiscord.com/screenshots/vd/releasechannel/apps.jpg) and selecting [settings](https://vrdiscord.com/screenshots/vd/releasechannel/settings.jpg).
 Download the previous Streamer from [GitHub](https://github.com/guygodin/VirtualDesktop/releases/) for the version you are installing.

blocks.name: **Pico**
blocks.value: Download the previous version APK and Streamer from [GitHub](https://github.com/guygodin/VirtualDesktop/releases/) for the version you are installing. Copy the APK to your Pico or download using the browser and install with File Browser, and reinstall the correct streamer.
